name: CFG Generation via COM
description: CANoe 12 exposes a COM Automation object model for configuration creation and saving. The supported automation path is to start CANoe.Application, create or open a configuration, modify supported setup objects, and call Configuration.SaveAs so CANoe writes the .cfg file.

The installed Help01 CHM index exposes COM Interface topics such as Open, Save, SaveAs, Add, and ReplaceDescriptionFile, but no stable public grammar for hand-writing .cfg serialization was found. Treat .cfg text as proprietary, versioned CANoe state.

interfaces.name: Application.Open
interfaces.purpose: Open an existing base .cfg before controlled updates.

interfaces.name: Configuration.SaveAs
interfaces.purpose: Ask CANoe to serialize the final .cfg.

interfaces.name: GeneralSetup.DatabaseSetup.Databases.Add
interfaces.purpose: Attach a database such as a DBC file.

interfaces.name: IDatabases3.AddToChannel
interfaces.purpose: Attach a database to a named network, bus type, and channel where the richer interface is available.

interfaces.name: GeneralSetup.DiagnosticsSetup.DiagDescriptions.Add
interfaces.purpose: Attach a diagnostic description file such as CDD.

interfaces.name: DiagDescription.SeednKeyDll
interfaces.purpose: Configure diagnostic Seed and Key DLL on supported diagnostic description interfaces.

interfaces.name: GeneralSetup.XCPSetup.ECUs.Add
interfaces.purpose: Attach an XCP/CCP ECU description such as A2L through Measurement and Calibration setup.

interfaces.name: Configuration.CLibraries.Add
interfaces.purpose: Register C libraries/DLLs where CANoe exposes them as configuration libraries.

rules: Prefer COM Automation over direct .cfg text generation.
Use base cfg copy as fallback when automation is unavailable or plugin-specific objects are not covered by public interfaces.
Do not mix CAPL authoring facts into CFG generation retrieval unless the active task explicitly asks for CAPL code.
source_evidence: D:/Program Files/Vector CANoe 12.0/Exec32/COMdev/CANoe.h: IDiagDescriptions.Add, IDiagDescription SeednKeyDll/ReplaceDescriptionFile
D:/Program Files/Vector CANoe 12.0/Exec32/COMdev/CANoe.h: IXCPSetup.ECUs and IMcECUs.Add
